testcase.name: Counter smart contract > generates initial ledger state deterministically
Counter smart contract > properly initializes ledger state and private state
Counter smart contract > increments the counter correctly
VERDICT DAO governance contract > constructor sets voteThreshold correctly
VERDICT DAO governance contract > registerCouncilMember adds member and increments councilSize
VERDICT DAO governance contract > registerCouncilMember adds multiple members
VERDICT DAO governance contract > registerGenesisCheck adds check to registry and increments totalChecks
VERDICT DAO governance contract > proposeCheck creates a proposal and increments totalProposals
VERDICT DAO governance contract > council member can vote FOR a proposal
VERDICT DAO governance contract > council member can vote AGAINST a proposal
VERDICT DAO governance contract > multiple council members can vote on a proposal
VERDICT DAO governance contract > non-council member cannot vote (assert fails)
VERDICT DAO governance contract > same member cannot vote twice on same proposal (assert fails)
VERDICT DAO governance contract > finalizeProposal accepts proposal when votesFor >= threshold and registers check
VERDICT DAO governance contract > finalizeProposal rejects proposal when votesFor < threshold
VERDICT DAO governance contract > cannot finalize an already finalized proposal (assert fails)
VERDICT DAO governance contract > registers 10 genesis checks (guardian set)
VERDICT DAO governance contract > registerGenesisVerifier creates v1.0 with all 10 guardians
VERDICT DAO governance contract > registerVerifierVersion requires council membership
VERDICT DAO governance contract > council member can register a new verifier version
VERDICT DAO governance contract > registerRuleset creates a lightweight ruleset pointing to verifier v1.0
VERDICT DAO governance contract > registerRuleset fails if enableMask exceeds verifier guardianMask
VERDICT DAO governance contract > registerRuleset fails if verifier version does not exist
VERDICT DAO governance contract > multiple rulesets can reference the same verifier version
VERDICT DAO governance contract > migrateRuleset moves ruleset to a newer verifier version
VERDICT DAO governance contract > migrateRuleset fails if caller is not owner
VERDICT DAO governance contract > migrateRuleset fails if enableMask exceeds new verifier mask
VERDICT DAO governance contract > deactivateRuleset marks ruleset as inactive
VERDICT DAO governance contract > deactivateRuleset fails if caller is not owner
VERDICT DAO governance contract > deactivateRuleset fails if already inactive
VERDICT DAO governance contract > full flow: council → genesis checks → genesis verifier → propose check → vote → finalize → register ruleset → migrate
VERDICT 10-check circuit > initializes ledger state correctly
VERDICT 10-check circuit > startSession sets sessionActive and lastChainHash
VERDICT 10-check circuit > commitMove stores commitment on ledger
VERDICT 10-check circuit > CLEAN move → verdict = clean (0), totalFlagged = 0
VERDICT 10-check circuit > CHECK 3: TELEPORT → flagged (velocity = 1590 > 100)
VERDICT 10-check circuit > CHECK 5: OUT OF BOUNDS → flagged (x = 1001 > 1000)
VERDICT 10-check circuit > CHECK 6: INVALID ACTION → flagged (action = 99 >= 4)
VERDICT 10-check circuit > CHECK 8: BOT → flagged (all same actions, diversity = 0)
VERDICT 10-check circuit > CHECK 4: SPEED RAMP → flagged (accel = 90 > 50)
VERDICT 10-check circuit > totalChecks increments on each verifyTransition call
